rationale: AC #6 not satisfied: required wired-in integration test TestServerIngestion_RealWorkerCanRegister that spawns a real subprocess POSTing to /api/workers/register is missing. Other ACs (handlers, JSONL append, registry fields, four named unit tests) are implemented.

findings.summary: Missing wired-in integration test TestServerIngestion_RealWorkerCanRegister — AC #6 requires a real subprocess HTTP client exercising the production path; only httptest.NewRecorder unit tests exist.
mirror_failures_count field is tracked in the record but never incremented anywhere; acceptable for step 1 since AC only requires that the field exist on the registry.
Diff under review only lists execution-evidence JSON; the implementation lives in commit 476d10fe (worker_ingest.go, worker_ingest_test.go, server.go) — review based on that commit.
